title: Phaseolus galactioides

The exact classification of Phaseolus galactioides is still being researched and may be subject to change. intro: Phaseolus galactioides is a perennial legume plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to regulate blood sugar levels and provide antioxidant properties, which may help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Phaseolus galactioides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
